Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Combat Art]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 15''' — Combat Art can summon a storm of blades from the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Combat Arts can be channeled through the ship spirit to empower weapons.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Raion's Combat Art is useless without the support of the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Combat Art can be used with great brutality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 14''' — The Karoshan's force-blade invokes a Combat Art that erupts in golden energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 37''' — Raion Raithe used a Combat Art during his fight with Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 43''' — The Lichborn's swords might be a Combat Art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Raion Raithe's Combat Art faded to a thin flame.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — The Red Knight uses Combat Art to block an attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — Albedon Pegarthus utilizes Combat Art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 31''' — Combat Art is a technique used by Parryl during her fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — The descent of a divine blade was identified as a Combat Art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — Zyrana uses Combat Art to nudge her shots into position.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Shyrax uses Combat Art in her motions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — The Combat Art of the Zenith Blade knocked Shadow Ark backwards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 21''' — Shyrax's movement crackled with her Combat Art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Aila uses a Combat Art that emits orange light from her blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Aila uses Combat Art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — An orange Combat Art sliced into Shyrax's chest.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
